items.name: Head Duplicator
items.description: After buying a mysterious potion from a witch in the woods, brothers Paul E. Cephaly and Paulie Cephaly merged into one body. They lost most of their intelligence in the process and wear bandages around their neck to stay together. They now make a living from touring circuses and schools.

items.name: Suspicious Tsundere Blush Face - Dynamic Head
items.description:
Looking sus? 😒 This anime-inspired suspicious face is perfect for characters with major trust issues or tsundere vibes! Features a subtle blush and sharp brows to express doubt, attitude, or silent judgment in roleplays, battles, or casual Roblox hangs.

✨ Pairs great with kawaii, edgy, or mystery-themed outfits!

Join my group WaterCat Meow Meow for more unique UGC faces and aesthetic styles 🐾
